notes: Solid pong implementation with proper physics, AI opponent, scoring, and audio; minor issues include the AI controlling P2 even when arrow keys are pressed (no clear 1P vs 2P mode distinction), and the gameover overlay uses a separate div while canvas also tries to render state, causing slight redundancy.

Solid Pong foundation with working scoring and collisions, but control design is muddled by simultaneous right-paddle manual control plus AI and some overlay/state inconsistencies keep it from feeling fully polished.
